narrative:
Cols 78-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,325 registered voters, with 68.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
